creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
gcc seg faults building print/xfce4-print on one particular system.  I suspect there might be an issue with /usr/bin/gcc and the old AMD Athlon 1.4GHz CPU (see dmesg.boot below).  I have not found another port that triggers the error, and the port has built successfully on other i386 systems with different CPUs.

This PR is meant more to publicize the workaround than to solicit a fix to the problem.
